content:
The instructor introduces false information into discussion to test student analysis.
The Joker (Dark Knight) – Subverting expectations and testing assumptions.


✅ Why This Works:
• Gives students a sense of shifting realities each week.
• Forces critical engagement by immersing students in a literary “role.”
• Ties into overarching themes of perception, narrative, and power.

📌 Version 5.1: Final Questions Before Ultimate Lock-In

1. Should XP be publicly displayed, or should each student only see their own XP?

✔ Public display creates competitive engagement, but private tracking prevents anxiety.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 137 (chunk 137/555)
